description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly blue mesh upper with synthetic overlays for added structure and durability. The shoe has a white, thick, cushioned midsole designed for comfort and shock absorption, and a dark rubber outsole for traction. A large, white Nike Swoosh logo is prominently displayed on the side, adding a distinctive brand identity. The shoe is equipped with standard criss-cross lacing and a padded tongue for a secure and comfortable fit. The heel and toe areas are reinforced, and the overall silhouette is streamlined for performance and style. The shoe appears clean, well-constructed, and suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and streets.
description: A blue athletic running shoe with a white Nike Swoosh, cushioned sole, and standard lacing, designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full Nike Swoosh logo, blue mesh upper, and white cushioned sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel structure, back seam, and the curvature of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible Nike Swoosh, lacing, and the shoe's overall profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, laces, and the shoe's streamlined shape.
attribute_logo: Large white Nike Swoosh on the side of the shoe
